name: Backend Health Check
description: After each spec task completes, hit the backend health endpoint to confirm the server is still running and responding

then.command: curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/health | node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'); const j=JSON.parse(d); console.log(j.status === 'ok' ? '✅ Backend healthy: ' + j.timestamp : '❌ Backend unhealthy: ' + d)"
